## Stack
| Category | Technology | Version | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|---------|-----------|
| Language | TypeScript | 5.3.x | Type safety, IDE support |
| Framework | Express.js | 4.18.x | Mature, large ecosystem |
| Database | PostgreSQL | 15.x | Relational data, JSONB support |
| Testing | Vitest | 1.x | Fast, ESM-native |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions | — | Native GitHub integration |
| Infrastructure | Railway | — | Simple deploys |
| Package Manager | pnpm | 8.x | Fast, disk efficient |
| Linter | ESLint | 8.x | Industry standard |
| Formatter | Prettier | 3.x | Consistent formatting |

## Commands
| Task | Command |
|------|---------|
| Install dependencies | `pnpm install` |
| Start dev server | `pnpm dev` |
| Run linter | `pnpm lint` |
| Run tests | `pnpm test` |
| Build for production | `pnpm build` |
